name: ice-tools
description: iCE productivity tools — 11 skills (graphify, nanobanana-connection, higgsfield-connection, higgsfield-generate, higgsfield-product-photoshoot, higgsfield-marketplace-cards, higgsfield-soul-id, notebooklm, cua-driver, automation-workflow, claude-codex-bridge) + 1 agent (codex-bridge-agent). v1.4.0 adds claude-codex-bridge — manual-turn conversation bridge so Claude can debate/review/pair with OpenAI Codex gpt-5.5 via the local Codex CLI.
